data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to reduce decision time, enhancing user experience.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation, clear call-to-action, intuitive design.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes interface design to improve user target acquisition.
data.technical_spec: Reachable buttons, responsive design, adaptable interface.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Balances aesthetics and usability to build user trust.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design, high-quality imagery, consistent branding.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Applies principles of perception to organize elements on the website.
data.technical_spec: Proximity grouping, similarity, and continuity in layouts.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: Uses defined boundaries to guide user interactions.
data.technical_spec: Contained sections, groupings with visual boundaries, clear demarcation.
